intents.name: greeting
responses: Namaste. I am your Khyathi Collections assistant. I can help with saree styling, jewellery picks, delivery, payments, and support.

intents.name: sarees
responses: Here are saree styles that are getting strong interest right now. I have included elegant festive, bridal, and versatile daily-wear options.

intents.name: jewellery
responses: Here are jewellery picks that pair beautifully with silk sarees, festive drapes, and bridal looks.

intents.name: bridal
responses: For bridal styling, I recommend starting with one rich saree option and one statement jewellery layer so the full look feels balanced and premium.

intents.name: delivery
responses: We ship across India. Orders are usually processed quickly, and delivery timelines vary by destination, stock readiness, and festive demand.

intents.name: payment
responses: You can complete secure online checkout using PhonePe, Google Pay, or Paytm.

intents.name: returns
responses: If you need help with returns or exchanges, our team can guide you on eligibility, condition checks, and the next steps.

intents.name: care
responses: For premium sarees and jewellery, gentle care matters. I can guide you with storage, cleaning, and occasion-specific handling tips.

intents.name: support
responses: Our team can help directly with styling, order questions, delivery updates, and product guidance.

intents.name: offers
responses: We keep our best surprise offers around selected product drops, curated edits, and Instagram updates.
